sql.kpi_total_approved_amount_1996: SELECT SUM(l.amount) AS total_approved_loan_amount FROM loan l WHERE l.date >= DATE '1996-01-01' AND l.date < DATE '1997-01-01';
sql.monthly_approved_loan_count: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', l.date)::date AS loan_month, COUNT(l.loan_id) AS approved_loan_count FROM loan l WHERE l.date >= DATE '1996-01-01' AND l.date < DATE '1997-01-01' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
sql.monthly_status_mix: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', l.date)::date AS loan_month, CASE l.status WHEN 'A' THEN 'finished OK' WHEN 'B' THEN 'finished default' WHEN 'C' THEN 'running OK' WHEN 'D' THEN 'running in debt' END AS status_label, COUNT(l.loan_id) AS loan_count FROM loan l WHERE l.date >= DATE '1996-01-01' AND l.date < DATE '1997-01-01' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2;
sql.avg_amount_by_duration: SELECT l.duration AS duration_months, AVG(l.amount) AS avg_loan_amount FROM loan l WHERE l.date >= DATE '1996-01-01' AND l.date < DATE '1997-01-01' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

chart_spec.layout_intent: executive dashboard with KPI row and three analytic charts underneath
